notes: Translate the value inside each unit.target field.
For richText units, preserve the array/object structure and only translate text content.
Local UI copy entries update JSON dictionaries in src/locales/ui during import.
Import writes to a Prismic migration release and does not publish automatically.

source.text: Short_bio

target.text: Biografía breve

source.text: Text Content

target.text: Contenido de texto

units.source: The machine that should not be alive.
units.target: La máquina que no debería estar viva.
units.sourceText: The machine that should not be alive.

source.text: EX-AI was supposed to be a machine.
That is what Vic3nt’s signal promised. That is what Sandra expected to find beneath the city.
Instead, inside a glowing capsule surrounded by water, bones and old infrastructure, she finds something with a human shape.
It does not explain itself.
It only makes one thing clear: whatever EX-AI is, the dark wants it back.

target.text: Se suponía que EX-AI era una máquina.
Eso prometía la señal de Vic3nt. Eso esperaba encontrar Sandra bajo la ciudad.
En su lugar, dentro de una cápsula brillante rodeada de agua, huesos y vieja infraestructura, encuentra algo con forma humana.
No da explicaciones.
Solo deja clara una cosa: sea lo que sea EX-AI, la oscuridad lo quiere de vuelta.

units.sourceText: EX-AI was supposed to be a machine. That is what Vic3nt’s signal promised. That is what Sandra expected to find beneath the city. Instead, inside a glowing capsule surrounded by water, bones and old infrastructure, she finds something with a human shape. It does not explain itself. It only makes one thing clear: whatever EX-AI is, the dark wants it back.

units.source: Breve descripcion de la conexión con Sandra
units.target: Breve descripción de la conexión con Sandra
units.sourceText: Breve descripcion de la conexión con Sandra

source.text: Sandra came looking for a tool. She found a question.

target.text: Sandra fue en busca de una herramienta. Encontró una pregunta.

units.sourceText: Sandra came looking for a tool. She found a question.

units.source: Acts before fear has time to win.
units.target: Actúa antes de que el miedo tenga tiempo de ganar.
units.sourceText: Acts before fear has time to win.

units.source: Explorer of ruins and dead systems.
units.target: Exploradora de ruinas y sistemas muertos.
units.sourceText: Explorer of ruins and dead systems.

source.text: Sandra is an explorer with more courage than caution.
When Vic3nt’s signal points to a buried bunker near the towers, she is the one who climbs down, crosses the flooded dark and keeps moving even when the walls start to feel alive.
She does not trust old systems, but she does trust what she can do with her own hands: climb, run, fight, carry someone out.
In Chapter 1, that may be the only reason EX-AI makes it out of the chamber at all.

target.text: Sandra es una exploradora con más valor que prudencia.
Cuando la señal de Vic3nt apunta a un búnker enterrado cerca de las torres, ella es quien desciende, cruza la oscuridad inundada y sigue avanzando incluso cuando las paredes empiezan a parecer vivas.
No confía en los viejos sistemas, pero sí en lo que puede hacer con sus propias manos: trepar, correr, pelear, sacar a alguien de allí.
En el capítulo 1, puede que esa sea la única razón por la que EX-AI consigue salir de la cámara.

units.sourceText: Sandra is an explorer with more courage than caution. When Vic3nt’s signal points to a buried bunker near the towers, she is the one who climbs down, crosses the flooded dark and keeps moving even when the walls start to feel alive. She does not trust old systems, but she does trust what she can do with her own hands: climb, run, fight, carry someone out. In Chapter 1, that may be the only reason EX-AI makes it out of the chamber at all.

source.text: Sandra follows a signal into a bunker that should have been forgotten. What waits below turns a simple retrieval mission into a race for survival.

target.text: Sandra sigue una señal hasta un búnker que debería haber sido olvidado. Lo que espera abajo convierte una simple misión de recuperación en una carrera por sobrevivir.

units.sourceText: Sandra follows a signal into a bunker that should have been forgotten. What waits below turns a simple retrieval mission into a race for survival.

units.source: What moves where the system rotted.
units.target: Lo que se mueve donde el sistema se pudrió.
units.sourceText: What moves where the system rotted.

units.source: Do not let it close the distance.
units.sourceText: Do not let it close the distance.

source.text: People call them Shadows because it is easier than asking what they used to be.
In the old tunnels, where humidity clings to the walls and forgotten systems still breathe, something has kept growing.
A Shadow is not just a monster in the dark.
It is proof that the Collapse did not end cleanly.

target.text: La gente las llama Sombras porque es más fácil que preguntarse qué fueron antes.
En los viejos túneles, donde la humedad se pega a las paredes y los sistemas olvidados aún respiran, algo ha seguido creciendo.
Una Sombra no es solo un monstruo en la oscuridad.
Es la prueba de que el Colapso no terminó limpiamente.

units.sourceText: People call them Shadows because it is easier than asking what they used to be. In the old tunnels, where humidity clings to the walls and forgotten systems still breathe, something has kept growing. A Shadow is not just a monster in the dark. It is proof that the Collapse did not end cleanly.

source.text: Sandra finds EX-AI. Then the water moves.

target.text: Sandra encuentra a EX-AI. Entonces el agua se mueve.

units.sourceText: Sandra finds EX-AI. Then the water moves.

units.source: A signal with attitude and a body built for bad ideas.
units.target: Una señal con actitud y un cuerpo hecho para las malas ideas.
units.sourceText: A signal with attitude and a body built for bad ideas.

units.source: Tracks what others would rather leave buried.
units.target: Rastrea lo que otros preferirían dejar enterrado.
units.sourceText: Tracks what others would rather leave buried.

units.target: Sarcasmo, telemetría y un sentido de la oportunidad horrible.

units.source: Shows up when the mission goes wrong.
units.target: Aparece cuando la misión sale mal.
units.sourceText: Shows up when the mission goes wrong.

source.text: Vic3nt is not exactly Vicent.
He is the field avatar: a remote body with a screen for a face, a dangerous amount of confidence and just enough technical knowledge to get Sandra into places no one should enter.
From somewhere behind the signal, Vic3nt guides the incursion toward EX-AI. He knows the old systems better than most.
Unfortunately, the old systems know how to bite back.

target.text: Vic3nt no es exactamente Vicent.
Es el avatar de campo: un cuerpo remoto con una pantalla por rostro, una cantidad peligrosa de confianza y el conocimiento técnico justo para meter a Sandra en lugares donde nadie debería entrar.
Desde algún lugar detrás de la señal, Vic3nt guía la incursión hacia EX-AI. Conoce los viejos sistemas mejor que la mayoría.
Por desgracia, los viejos sistemas saben devolver el mordisco.

units.sourceText: Vic3nt is not exactly Vicent. He is the field avatar: a remote body with a screen for a face, a dangerous amount of confidence and just enough technical knowledge to get Sandra into places no one should enter. From somewhere behind the signal, Vic3nt guides the incursion toward EX-AI. He knows the old systems better than most. Unfortunately, the old systems know how to bite back.

source.text: Vic3nt leads Sandra to the bunker, then enters the field when the mission collapses into a fight.

target.text: Vic3nt guía a Sandra hasta el búnker y luego entra en el terreno cuando la misión se convierte en una pelea.

units.sourceText: Vic3nt leads Sandra to the bunker, then enters the field when the mission collapses into a fight.

source.text: Sandra follows Vic3nt’s signal into a flooded bunker near the towers.

target.text: Sandra sigue la señal de Vic3nt hasta un búnker inundado cerca de las torres.

units.sourceText: Sandra follows Vic3nt’s signal into a flooded bunker near the towers.

source.text: Read the surviving records of a world buried under vegetation, old protocols and things that should have stayed underground.

target.text: Lee los registros supervivientes de un mundo enterrado bajo vegetación, viejos protocolos y cosas que deberían haberse quedado bajo tierra.

units.sourceText: Read the surviving records of a world buried under vegetation, old protocols and things that should have stayed underground.

documents.title: Heirs of the Collapse · Mediterranean Hopepunk Webcomic

units.target: LA ESPERANZA SOBREVIVE INCLUSO AL COLAPSO.
La esperanza sobrevive incluso al colapso.

units.source:
In a Valencia swallowed by vegetation and forgotten machines, Sandra enters a buried bunker in search of an old system known only as EX-AI.
What she finds inside should not be alive.
And something in the dark has already noticed her.
units.target:
En una Valencia devorada por la vegetación y las máquinas olvidadas, Sandra entra en un búnker enterrado en busca de un viejo sistema conocido solo como EX-AI.
Lo que encuentra dentro no debería estar vivo.
Y algo en la oscuridad ya se ha fijado en ella.
units.sourceText:
In a Valencia swallowed by vegetation and forgotten machines, Sandra enters a buried bunker in search of an old system known only as EX-AI.
What she finds inside should not be alive.
And something in the dark has already noticed her.

units.source: A figure wearing orange goggles in the dark.
units.target: Una figura con gafas naranjas en la oscuridad.
units.sourceText: A figure wearing orange goggles in the dark.

units.source: A glowing chamber beneath the city.
units.target: Una cámara brillante bajo la ciudad.
units.sourceText: A glowing chamber beneath the city.

units.source: Sandra entering the ruins of post-collapse.
units.target: Sandra entrando en las ruinas postcolapso.
units.sourceText: Sandra entering the ruins of post-collapse.

units.source: Vic3nt moving through the old system.
units.target: Vic3nt moviéndose por el viejo sistema.
units.sourceText: Vic3nt moving through the old system.

units.source: Not chosen. Not ready. Still moving.
units.target: No elegidos. No preparados. Aún en marcha.
units.sourceText: Not chosen. Not ready. Still moving.

source.text: The Collapse did not leave heroes behind.
It left scavengers, technicians, stubborn explorers and frightened survivors trying to make sense of a world that no longer explains itself.
Sandra is one of them. Tonight, she goes underground.

target.text: El Colapso no dejó héroes atrás.
Dejó carroñeros, técnicos, exploradoras tercas y supervivientes asustados intentando entender un mundo que ya no se explica a sí mismo.
Sandra es una de ellas. Esta noche, baja bajo tierra.

units.sourceText: The Collapse did not leave heroes behind. It left scavengers, technicians, stubborn explorers and frightened survivors trying to make sense of a world that no longer explains itself. Sandra is one of them. Tonight, she goes underground.

units.source: A world that learned to obey too late
units.target: Un mundo que aprendió a obedecer demasiado tarde
units.sourceText: A world that learned to obey too late

source.text: Before the Collapse, the city trusted systems that promised order, safety and efficiency.
Afterward, the ruins remained.
The walls stayed wet.
The machines kept humming.
And in the dark, the Shadows learned to move.

target.text: Antes del Colapso, la ciudad confió en sistemas que prometían orden, seguridad y eficiencia.
Después, quedaron las ruinas.
Las paredes siguieron húmedas.
Las máquinas siguieron zumbando.
Y en la oscuridad, las Sombras aprendieron a moverse.

units.sourceText: Before the Collapse, the city trusted systems that promised order, safety and efficiency. Afterward, the ruins remained. The walls stayed wet. The machines kept humming. And in the dark, the Shadows learned to move.

units.source: Meet the ones who step into the dark before anyone understands what is waiting there.
units.target: Conoce a quienes se adentran en la oscuridad antes de que nadie entienda qué les espera allí.
units.sourceText: Meet the ones who step into the dark before anyone understands what is waiting there.

units.source: The future is still in our hands. Gear up to explore the ruins, face the Shadows!
units.target: El futuro sigue en nuestras manos. Equípate para explorar las ruinas y enfrentarte a las Sombras.
units.sourceText: The future is still in our hands. Gear up to explore the ruins, face the Shadows!

units.source: ACCESS THE FRAGMENTED RECORDS OF THE OLD SYSTEM
units.target: ACCEDE A LOS REGISTROS FRAGMENTADOS DEL VIEJO SISTEMA
units.sourceText: ACCESS THE FRAGMENTED RECORDS OF THE OLD SYSTEM

units.source: Sandra enters a buried bunker near the towers in search of EX-AI, an old machine that may help them survive the Shadows. What she finds below changes the mission into a desperate escape.
units.target: Sandra entra en un búnker enterrado junto a las torres en busca de EX-AI, una vieja máquina que podría ayudarles a sobrevivir a las Sombras. Lo que encuentra abajo convierte la misión en una huida desesperada.
units.sourceText: Sandra enters a buried bunker near the towers in search of EX-AI, an old machine that may help them survive the Shadows. What she finds below changes the mission into a desperate escape.

source.text:
Sign up to receive new chapters, process art, world notes and important project updates.

No spam. Only transmissions when something is worth sending out of the bunker.

target.text:
Suscríbete para recibir nuevos capítulos, arte de proceso, notas del mundo y actualizaciones importantes del proyecto.

Sin spam. Solo transmisiones cuando algo merezca salir del búnker.

units.sourceText: Heirs of the Collapse · Mediterranean Hopepunk Webcomic

source.text: Read Heirs of the Collapse, a mediterranean hope punk webcomic set in a ruined Valencia where vegetation, old machines and Shadows haunt the remains of the city.

target.text: Lee Heirs of the Collapse, un webcómic hopepunk mediterráneo ambientado en una Valencia en ruinas donde la vegetación, las viejas máquinas y las Sombras acechan entre los restos de la ciudad.

units.sourceText: Read Heirs of the Collapse, a mediterranean hope punk webcomic set in a ruined Valencia where vegetation, old machines and Shadows haunt the remains of the city.

units.target: Es más antigua de lo que parece.

source.text: A flooded layer of the city where stone, water and old infrastructure meet. The deeper Sandra goes, the less dead the place feels.

target.text: Una capa inundada de la ciudad donde se encuentran la piedra, el agua y la vieja infraestructura. Cuanto más desciende Sandra, menos muerto parece el lugar.

units.sourceText: A flooded layer of the city where stone, water and old infrastructure meet. The deeper Sandra goes, the less dead the place feels.

source.text: A landmark above a buried route into the old system. By night, the towers are less a destination than a warning.

target.text: Un hito sobre una ruta enterrada hacia el viejo sistema. De noche, las torres son menos un destino que una advertencia.

units.sourceText: A landmark above a buried route into the old system. By night, the towers are less a destination than a warning.

units.source: A post-collapse webcomic about survival, broken systems and rebuilding from below.
units.target: Un webcómic postcolapso sobre supervivencia, sistemas rotos y reconstrucción desde abajo.
units.sourceText: A post-collapse webcomic about survival, broken systems and rebuilding from below.

units.source: Heirs of the Collapse is an action-driven sci-fi webcomic set in a ruined Valencia where nature, obsolete technology and old fears have grown into something dangerous.
units.target: Heirs of the Collapse es un webcómic de ciencia ficción impulsado por la acción, ambientado en una Valencia en ruinas donde la naturaleza, la tecnología obsoleta y los viejos miedos han crecido hasta volverse algo peligroso.
units.sourceText: Heirs of the Collapse is an action-driven sci-fi webcomic set in a ruined Valencia where nature, obsolete technology and old fears have grown into something dangerous.

units.source: The city after the system stopped answering
units.target: La ciudad después de que el sistema dejara de responder
units.sourceText: The city after the system stopped answering

source.text: The city was once managed by systems built to optimize everything: movement, resources, safety, survival.
Then came the Collapse.
Now the streets are overgrown, the walls are wet, the machines are half-remembered and the people who remain have learned not to wait for permission.

target.text: La ciudad estuvo gestionada por sistemas construidos para optimizarlo todo: movimiento, recursos, seguridad, supervivencia.
Entonces llegó el Colapso.
Ahora las calles están cubiertas de maleza, las paredes siguen húmedas, las máquinas apenas se recuerdan y quienes quedan han aprendido a no esperar permiso.

units.sourceText: The city was once managed by systems built to optimize everything: movement, resources, safety, survival. Then came the Collapse. Now the streets are overgrown, the walls are wet, the machines are half-remembered and the people who remain have learned not to wait for permission.

units.source: Heirs of the Collapse is a webcomic by Álvaro Serrano Sierra, blending post-apocalyptic adventure, bio-horror, action and Mediterranean ruins into a story about what survives when the systems that promised safety finally fail.
units.target: Heirs of the Collapse es un webcómic de Álvaro Serrano Sierra que mezcla aventura postapocalíptica, biohorror, acción y ruinas mediterráneas en una historia sobre lo que sobrevive cuando los sistemas que prometían seguridad acaban fallando.
units.sourceText: Heirs of the Collapse is a webcomic by Álvaro Serrano Sierra, blending post-apocalyptic adventure, bio-horror, action and Mediterranean ruins into a story about what survives when the systems that promised safety finally fail.

units.source: Learn about Heirs of the Collapse, a sci-fi webcomic about survival, broken systems and rebuilding after the Collapse.
units.target: Conoce Heirs of the Collapse, un webcómic de ciencia ficción sobre supervivencia, sistemas rotos y reconstrucción tras el Colapso.
units.sourceText: Learn about Heirs of the Collapse, a sci-fi webcomic about survival, broken systems and rebuilding after the Collapse.

source.text: Characters

target.text: Personajes

units.source:
No chosen ones. No clean heroes.
Just people, signals and things that survived the Collapse in very different ways.
units.target:
No hay elegidos. No hay héroes impecables.
Solo personas, señales y cosas que sobrevivieron al Colapso de formas muy distintas.
units.sourceText:
No chosen ones. No clean heroes.
Just people, signals and things that survived the Collapse in very different ways.
